MOTHER'S DAY 2026

Happy Mother's Day, Nenuuu!

To the world's best baker and the heart of our house, my mumma 🥹

❤️

For the last 18 years, every handmade gift I've ever made has been for you, because no one deserves it more. This year, as a data science student, I wanted to make something that shows you how I've grown, while still carrying the same love that started with paper and glue.

You are the backbone and heart of our little family of three. For both me and Papa, you are the most important person in the world, and the most loving and caring person we know. Watching you bake with your full passion is honestly one of the most beautiful things I have ever witnessed.

🍪 Macaroons 🍫 Brownies 🎂 Mawa Cake

With all my love,

Bebu ❤️
